name: operatum-ci
description: Reusable GitHub Actions workflow pack for operatum-managed repos. Not published to npm — the deliverable is the .github/workflows/ + actions/ tree, consumed via `uses: operatum-ai/operatum-ci/...@v1`.

scripts.test: node --test --test-reporter=spec test/compose-summary.test.mjs test/post-callback.test.mjs test/setup-toolchain.test.mjs test/playwright-suite-drift-gate.test.mjs test/reusable-workflow-owner.test.mjs
